a:r.a:t: Comprehensive climate risk intelligence at your fingertips
Natural language interface for intuitive queries. No technical expertise required.
Interactive heatmaps for flood and heat risk with real-time overlays.
Seamless integration with OSM for accurate geospatial data and city mapping.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation for context-aware policy recommendations.
One-click generation of comprehensive, shareable reports for stakeholders.
Not just chatbot → Visual + Analytical AI combining conversation with powerful data visualization
